items.title: Nasdaq Surges Over 100 Points, Records Gains In October: Greed Index Remains In 'Fear' Zone
items.description: CNN Money Fear and Greed index remained in Fear zone on Friday. US stocks closed higher, Nasdaq up 4.7% in October. Amazon reported earnings.

items.title: Tracking Baillie Gifford's 13F Portfolio - Q3 2025 Update
25% of Warren Buffett's $315 Billion Portfolio Is Invested in 2 Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks
items.description: AI isn't the only reason to buy them.

items.title: Warren Buffett Opens Up About The Biggest Investing Blunders Of His Career — Here They Are
items.description: Over the decades, the "Oracle of Omaha" has shared candid reflections on his biggest blunders, from emotional decisions to missed opportunities, all of which provide timeless investing insights.

items.title: Amazon says its AI shopping assistant Rufus is so effective it’s on pace to pull in an extra $10 billion in sales
items.description: Customers who engage with Rufus during their shopping journey are 60% more likely to complete a purchase compared to those who don't.
